revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a 128x32 pixel-art animated sprite sheet for a game-development asset.

Canvas and grid:
- Exact sheet size: 128x32px.
- Grid layout: 1 row x 4 equal columns.
- Each frame/cell is 32x32px.
- Background must be solid #FF00FF magenta chroma key in all empty space, with no gradients.
- Do not draw cell separator lines, grid lines, frame borders, frame numbers, labels, text, UI, logos, or watermarks anywhere.

Style:
- SNES / 16-bit platformer pixel art, crisp low-resolution pixels, no antialiasing blur.
- Bright mythical-Japan action RPG feel.
- Sacred white-and-gold purification slash effect.
- Top-left light source.
- Use a consistent bright palette and a dark one-pixel outline where useful.
- Keep clear solid magenta margin between all effect pixels and every cell edge.
- No detached fragments: avoid isolated dust specks, leftover residue, seam slivers, or random pixel islands.

Subject:
- EFFECT ONLY. No character, no body, no face, no creature, no weapon handle.
- A right-facing crescent sword-slash arc of sacred white-and-gold light.
- The crescent arc opens and travels toward the RIGHT.
- Include a few small white paper-streamer shide petals and gold spark motes along the slash arc, but keep them connected/readable as part of the effect and not random isolated debris.
- Same position and scale across frames, drawn large within each 32x32 cell while staying contained.

Animation frames, left to right:
1. Frame 1: the crescent slash arc appears thin, compact, and very bright, beginning the right-facing purification stroke.
2. Frame 2: full crescent at maximum size, brightest and thickest, with a few gold sparks and white shide petals following the arc.
3. Frame 3: the crescent breaks into readable streamer-petal pieces and gold motes along the same right-facing arc path, starting to dissipate.
4. Frame 4: fading motes only, very sparse but still clustered along the former arc path, no random isolated residue.

Avoid completely:
- No Mario/Nintendo/Zelda/Final Fantasy/Pokemon/Dragon Quest/Secret of Mana/Okami/Sakuna characters, logos, or likeness.
- No samurai armor, kabuto helmet, ninja outfit, two-sword daisho, gun, modern objects, horror mood, dark gloomy palette, bird, companion creature, letter emblems, modern text, watermark, or UI.

Output should be a single clean PNG sheet only.
